name: Avatar
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from examples/astryx/.astryx-sandbox/node_modules/@astryxdesign/core/src/Avatar/Avatar.tsx (react-tsx adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: alt
props.description:
The alt text shown on hover and made accessible to screen readers.
Falls back to `name` if not provided.

props.name: fallbackSrc
props.description:
Fallback image source when primary `src` fails to load.
If this also fails, shows initials derived from `name`.

props.name: name
props.description:
The user's name. Used for:
- Generating initials when no image is available
- Default alt text if `alt` is not provided

props.name: src
props.description: The primary image source for the avatar.
